ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Admin successfully accesses user registration form and selects a role
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Admin and has access to user registration module.
steps: Enter user details: User Name, Email, Phone.
expected_result: User registration form is displayed. User details are entered successfully, and role is selected.

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Non-admin user attempts to access user registration form
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer and does not have access to user registration module.
steps: Attempt to access the user registration form.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Access denied message is displayed.

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Admin accesses user registration form with invalid role selection
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Admin and has access to user registration module.
steps: Enter user details: User Name, Email, Phone.
expected_result: Inline validation error is displayed indicating 'Invalid role selection'.

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Accessing user registration form without authentication
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
No user is logged in.
steps: Send request to access the user registration form.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Unauthorized access message is displayed.

ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.
title: Valid user details create user successfully
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Admin and has permission to create users.
expected_result: User is created successfully and assigned the role Manager.

ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.
title: Missing email field returns validation error
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Admin and has permission to create users.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains field-level error: Email is required.

ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.
title: Unauthorized role cannot create user
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Teller and does not have permission to create users.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains error: Unauthorized access.

ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.
title: Unauthenticated request is denied cleanly
preconditions: API is deployed and accessible.
No authentication token is provided.
steps: Send POST request to create user endpoint without authentication token.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains error: Authentication required.

ac_text: Given I assign a role, when the user logs in, then their access should be limited to their assigned role.
title: User with Admin role logs in and accesses Admin features
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Admin and has full access permissions.
expected_result: User is redirected to Admin Dashboard with full access.

ac_text: Given I assign a role, when the user logs in, then their access should be limited to their assigned role.
title: User with Teller role attempts to access Admin features
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Teller and has limited access permissions.
steps: Attempt to navigate to Admin Dashboard.
expected_result: Access is denied with HTTP 403 Forbidden.

ac_text: Given I assign a role, when the user logs in, then their access should be limited to their assigned role.
title: Unauthenticated request is denied cleanly
preconditions: API is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
steps: Send request to access protected resource without authentication.
expected_result: HTTP 401 Unauthorized is returned.

ac_text: Given I try to register a user with an existing email, when I submit the form, then I should see an error message.
title: Register user with unique email succeeds
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Admin and has permission to register users.
expected_result: User is created successfully and assigned the Manager role.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

ac_text: Given I try to register a user with an existing email, when I submit the form, then I should see an error message.
title: Register user with existing email shows error
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Admin and has permission to register users.
Email unique@example.com is already registered.
expected_result: Error message is displayed: 'Email already exists.'

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Designed to catch failures or misbehavior

ac_text: Given I try to register a user with an existing email, when I submit the form, then I should see an error message.
title: Duplicate email registration attempt via API returns error
preconditions: API is accessible and operational.
User account exists with role Admin and has permission to register users.
Email unique@example.com is already registered.
steps: Send POST request to /api/register with email unique@example.com, name Alice Johnson, and role Admin.
expected_result: HTTP 400 is returned. Response body contains error: 'Email already exists.'

ac_text: Given I try to register a user with an existing email, when I submit the form, then I should see an error message.
title: Database constraint violation on duplicate email registration
preconditions: Database is operational.
User account exists with role Admin and has permission to register users.
Email unique@example.com is already registered in the database.
steps: Attempt to insert a new user record with email unique@example.com into the users table.
expected_result: Database constraint violation occurs. Error message indicates duplicate email.
review_feedback: completeness: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations

completeness.reason: Missing execution detail or contains quality violations

ac_text: Given I am not an Admin, when I try to access the user registration form, then I should be denied access.
title: Non-Admin user attempts to access user registration form
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has no access to User Registration module.
steps: Navigate to the user registration form URL.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains message: Access Denied.

ac_text: Given I am not an Admin, when I try to access the user registration form, then I should be denied access.
title: Access Attempt with Expired Token
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has an expired session token.
steps: Navigate to the user registration form URL.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains message: Session expired.

ac_text: Given I am not an Admin, when I try to access the user registration form, then I should be denied access.
title: Access Denied for Non-Admin user
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment.
User account exists with role Customer_Service_Agent and has no access to User Registration module.
steps: Send a GET request to the user registration API endpoint.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains message: Access Denied.

ac_text: Given a user is created, when I view the user list, then the new user should appear with the correct role.
title: New user appears in user list with correct role
preconditions: User account exists with role Admin and has permission to view user list.
User 'John Doe' is created with role 'Teller'.
expected_result: User 'John Doe' appears in the user list with role 'Teller'.

ac_text: Given a user is created, when I view the user list, then the new user should appear with the correct role.
title: User list does not show deleted user
preconditions: User account exists with role Admin and has permission to view user list.
User 'Jane Smith' is created with role 'Manager' and then deleted.
expected_result: User 'Jane Smith' does not appear in the user list.

ac_text: Given a user is created, when I view the user list, then the new user should appear with the correct role.
title: Unauthorized user cannot view user list
preconditions: User account exists with role Teller and does not have permission to view user list.
steps: Attempt to access the user list page.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Access denied message is displayed.

ac_text: Given a user is created, when I view the user list, then the new user should appear with the correct role.
title: Unauthenticated request to user list is denied
steps: Send a request to the user list endpoint without authentication.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Unauthorized message is displayed.
